title: Mashed Potatoes
description: Ultra-smooth, buttery mashed potatoes made with heavy cream and a savory touch of nutritional yeast.

steps.instruction: Peel and cube potatoes. Boil in salted water for 15–18 minutes until fork-tender.
Drain potatoes thoroughly; let steam dry for 1–2 minutes.
Transfer to a blender or food processor with butter and heavy cream.
Add nutritional yeast, salt, white pepper, and garlic powder if using.
Blend on high for 60 seconds. Scrape down sides and blend again.
Add water or additional cream, 1 tbsp at a time, blending between additions, until smooth and creamy.
Taste and adjust seasoning. Serve warm.

notes: Nutritional yeast adds a subtle cheesy, savory flavor along with B vitamins. Heavy cream adds richness — worth every calorie.
